variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 70386 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB550
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 70386 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB550. Easy to install and replace, the SD 70386 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
